top_signals.title: Analysts tip pressure for Bitcoin, gold as US inflation tops 4%
top_signals.summary: “We continue to view the current macro environment as a headwind for Bitcoin,” 10x Research’s Markus Thielen said.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Inflation expectations impacting rate path, bonds and global risk assets.

top_signals.title: Alibaba, JD.com Slide After Beijing Slams Price-Cut Promotions
top_signals.summary: Shares of Alibaba Group Holding Ltd. and JD.com Inc. slid in Hong Kong after China’s market watchdog reprimanded top Chinese e-commerce players for what it said were misleading sales promotions.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Physical Oil Markets Are Floundering Despite 100 Days of War - Bloomberg.com
top_signals.summary: Physical Oil Markets Are Floundering Despite 100 Days of War  Bloomberg.com
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Hanuman Wind Pulls Bond Deal Again as Parent Governance Clouds
top_signals.summary: Hanuman Wind Power, a Hong Kong-based unit of troubled Thai renewable energy firm Energy Absolute Pcl, postponed a junk bond offering for a second time after it failed to attract the desired investor demand, according to a person familiar with the matter who asked not to be identified.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Tether leads up to $1.4 billion round in robotics firm Neura, plans crypto wallet integration
top_signals.summary: Tether will also provide and "deploy" technology within the Neura robotics ecosystem, including a crypto wallet integration.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: Abbove strengthens its banking position with the deployment of its platform at ING in Belgium
top_signals.summary: Belgian WealthTech Abbove announces the deployment of its wealth planning platform at ING Belgium. The bank is making a new digital wealth planning experience, ING Financial Compass, available to its Personal Banking and Private Banking clients, built on Abbove technology and specially adapted to its advisory model. This press release features multimedia. View the full [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: CFTC proposes framework favoring sports event contracts over gambling
top_signals.summary: The proposed rules would preserve election markets and allow many sports-based prediction contracts while limiting bets that could encourage manipulation.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Curatis Increases Revenue Growth Guidance for 2026
top_signals.summary: Curatis Holding AG (SIX: CURN) increases its revenue growth guidance for the financial year 2026: the company is forecasting a revenue growth of approximately 40% in 2026, in contrast to the previous outlook of over 25%. Based on preliminary figures for the first five months of 2026, Curatis expects a significantly higher than anticipated revenue [...]
